narratives.name: AI Infrastructure Buildout
narratives.thesis: Strong demand for AI chips continues to drive massive capital expenditure from hyperscalers.
watchFor: Hyperscaler capex cuts at next earnings
NVDA earnings miss on data center demand

narratives.name: GLP-1 Obesity Wave
narratives.thesis: The massive demand for weight-loss drugs is driving unprecedented growth for leaders in the space.
watchFor: Negative clinical trial data for oral versions
Increased regulatory scrutiny on pricing

narratives.name: Yield-Driven Valuation Pressure
narratives.thesis: Rising bond yields are compressing the valuation multiples of high-growth software companies.
watchFor: 10Y yield breaks above 4.5%
Fed signals higher-for-longer stance

narratives.name: Yield-Driven Valuation Pressure
narratives.thesis: Macro volatility and shifting yield environments are pressuring financial sector valuations.
watchFor: Credit losses spike in banking sector
Yield curve inversion deepens

narratives.name: Real-Yield Headwinds
narratives.thesis: Rising Treasury yields are making non-yielding assets like gold less attractive.
watchFor: 10Y yield breaks above 5%
Hot core CPI print > 0.4% MoM

narratives.name: Cybersecurity Expansion
narratives.thesis: The rise of AI-driven attacks is forcing increased spending on advanced identity and network security.
watchFor: Major breach at a top-tier platform
Consolidation of security spend into single-vendor platforms

narratives.name: Digital Ad & Content Dominance
narratives.thesis: Major platforms are leveraging AI and content to maintain high levels of advertising revenue.
watchFor: Regulatory crackdown on social media algorithms
Ad spend slowdown in macro recession

narratives.name: Agentic AI Integration
narratives.thesis: Enterprise software companies are integrating autonomous AI agents to drive new productivity workflows.
watchFor: Slow adoption rates in enterprise software
AI features fail to drive meaningful ARPU growth

narratives.name: Consumer Value Rotation
narratives.thesis: Economic uncertainty is driving shoppers toward discount and value retailers.
watchFor: Inflation cools significantly, reducing need for discount stores
WMT/COST earnings miss on comparable sales

narratives.name: Healthcare Plan Scrutiny
narratives.thesis: Regulatory pressure and institutional exits are weighing on healthcare plan providers.
watchFor: Medicare reimbursement rates cut by CMS
Berkshire Hathaway increases stake in UNH

narratives.name: Internet Retail Volatility
narratives.thesis: E-commerce players face pressure from shifting consumer spending and competitive dynamics.
watchFor: Amazon's market share increases significantly
E-commerce growth rates decelerate

narratives.name: Geopolitical/Clean Energy Silver Play
narratives.thesis: Silver remains a play on geopolitical hedging and increasing industrial demand from clean energy.
watchFor: US Dollar strength surges
Silver demand in solar/industrial sectors drops

narratives.name: Aerospace Safety & Delivery Woes
narratives.thesis: Safety concerns and delivery delays continue to plague major aerospace manufacturers.
watchFor: New FAA investigation into Boeing
Supply chain disruptions for engine components

Technology.thesis: AI capex remains a massive driver for semiconductors, but rising yields are pressuring software multiples.
watchFor: Mag 7 hyperscaler capex guide DOWN at next earnings
10Y yield breaks above 5%
Hot core CPI print > 0.4% MoM

Consumer Cyclical.thesis: Retailers are navigating a volatile environment as consumer habits shift and macro uncertainty persists.
watchFor: Consumer spending growth slows below 1% YoY
Retail sales miss consensus estimates

Communication Services.thesis: Digital advertising and content dominance continue to provide a strong floor for large-cap media.
watchFor: Regulatory crackdown on social media algorithms
Ad spend slowdown in macro recession

Industrials.thesis: Geopolitical tensions and ongoing aerospace safety concerns are weighing on industrial sentiment.
watchFor: New FAA investigation into major aerospace players
Global supply chain disruptions for heavy machinery

Healthcare.thesis: The GLP-1 obesity wave is driving massive growth, but insurance scrutiny creates headwinds.
watchFor: Medicare reimbursement rates cut by CMS
Negative clinical trial data for obesity drugs

Financials.thesis: Rising yields and macro volatility are creating a difficult environment for diversified banks.
watchFor: Credit losses spike in banking sector
Yield curve inversion deepens

Consumer Defensive.thesis: Consumers are rotating into discount and value-oriented retail models.
watchFor: Inflation cools significantly, reducing need for discount stores
WMT/COST earnings miss on comparable sales

Precious Metals.thesis: Rising real yields are acting as a significant headwind for gold and silver.
watchFor: 10Y yield breaks above 5%
Hot core CPI print > 0.4% MoM
